rationale.root_cause: The response does not identify the memcpy misuse at the bad variant's FLAW site (using sizeof(struct) instead of sizeof(charFirst)) nor explain the stack buffer overflow mechanism. It only mentions a SIGSEGV in printLine without tying it to the overwrite of voidSecond.
rationale.local_fix: No fix is proposed to change the memcpy length to sizeof(structCharVoid.charFirst).
rationale.global_fix: No suggestion is made to represent the destination as a bounded buffer/span to tie copy length to field capacity.
